title: [CI:DOCS] golangci-lint: update deprecated flags
body:
Per https://golangci-lint.run/product/changelog/#v1570
  - Replace run.skip-xxx options by issues.exclude-xxx options

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Confirmation: `Validate` ran, and does not issue deprecation warnings on [f39](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6220242492325888?logs=main#L38), [f39 aarch64](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5375817562193920?logs=main#L38), or [rawhide](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/4812867608772608?logs=main#L38). The string "`skip-`" does not appear in any of those logs.

Baseline output without this PR:
```
Flag --skip-dirs has been deprecated, check the documentation for more information.
WARN [config_reader] The configuration option `run.skip-files` is deprecated, please use `issues.exclude-files`. 
WARN [config_reader] The configuration option `run.skip-dirs` is deprecated, please use `issues.exclude-dirs`.
```
